elements.original_description: A smiling cartoon character holding a heart-shaped balloon in one hand and a gift box in the other, standing in the center of a pure white background. The character radiates warmth and happiness.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A smiling cartoon character holding a bright red heart-shaped balloon in one hand and a colorfully wrapped gift box in the other. The character stands centered on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges. The character's expression radiates warmth, kindness, and happiness.

elements.original_description: The same cartoon character placing the gift box on the ground, with a piggy bank next to it, symbolizing saving money. The character smiles confidently, standing on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. The same cartoon character, smiling confidently, placing the colorfully wrapped gift box on the ground. Next to the gift box is a traditional ceramic piggy bank, symbolizing saving money. The character stands on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges. The scene conveys a feeling of confidence and prudent decision-making.
